acceptance_criteria: oai-runner binary can execute multi-turn agent loops against MiniMax and GLM/Zai APIs with streaming output
Provider auto-detection infers correct API base URL and key from model ID pattern
Native tools (read/write/edit/list/search/execute) work with path traversal prevention
search_files tool excludes build artifacts and respects .gitignore (TASK-218)
Model routing correctly selects claude for gated pipeline phases unless explicitly overridden (TASK-219)
Tool launch args and capabilities are config-driven, not hardcoded (TASK-152)
description:
Provide a standalone, OpenAI-compatible agent runner binary (ao-oai-runner) that enables AO to orchestrate AI agents against any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint — currently MiniMax and GLM/Zai, with extensibility for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, and others.

## Current State

The oai-runner crate is fully built and integrated into the AO routing pipeline. It supports:
- Streaming SSE chat completions against OpenAI-compatible APIs
- Multi-turn agent loops with 6 native tools (read_file, write_file, edit_file, list_files, search_files, execute_command)
- Automatic provider detection and API key resolution (MiniMax, GLM/Zai, DeepSeek, OpenRouter)
- MCP tool integration for remote tool extension
- JSON schema validation with retry logic for structured output
- Path traversal prevention and security hardening
- Read-only mode for research phases

## Provider Coverage

| Provider | Model Pattern | API Base | Status |
|----------|--------------|----------|--------|
| MiniMax  | minimax/*    | api.minimax.io/v1 | Active |
| GLM/Zai  | glm/*, zai/* | api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4 | Active |
| DeepSeek | deepseek/*   | api.deepseek.com/v1 | Configured (routes to opencode) |
| OpenRouter | openrouter/* | openrouter.ai/api/v1 | Configured |

## Architecture

The oai-runner is a process-isolated binary spawned by the agent-runner daemon. It communicates via structured JSON lines on stdout. The dispatch chain is:
1. daemon_scheduler_phase_targets.rs resolves model/tool per phase
2. runtime_contract.rs builds the CLI launch command
3. agent-runner spawns ao-oai-runner as a subprocess
4. oai-runner streams SSE from the provider and executes tool calls locally

## Open Work

- search_files tool performance: naive grep scans target/.git/ causing 4+ minute hangs (TASK-218)
- Model routing defaults: workflow execute defaults to MiniMax instead of claude for gated pipeline phases (TASK-219)
- Config-driven tool definitions: hardcoded match arms in runtime_contract.rs and phase_executor.rs should be driven by agent-runtime-config JSON (TASK-152)
title: OpenAI-Compatible Agent Runner (oai-runner) for Multi-Provider LLM Execution
